titles.title: When We All in One Accord

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I was glad when they said unto me Let us go in the house of the Lord For it's there that His glory we see When we are all in one accord.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When We All are in one accord When we All are in one accord Forsaking not the assembling Of ourselves together When we All are inn one accord

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Whatever the need you have Is anything hard from the Lord? His here have known your need, In faith we looking at the unseen, When we All are in one accord.
